execution._paper_note: Paper mode simulates fills at last close. Set to false for live.

alphas._note: Uses taker_buy_ratio/funding — will be SKIPPED if data missing

alphas.expression: df_min(df_max(add(add(add(add(zscore_cs(sma(true_divide(lower_shadow, df_max(high_low_range, 0.001)), 120)), zscore_cs(sma(taker_buy_ratio, 120))), zscore_cs(sma(ts_delta(s_log_1p(adv60), 30), 120))), zscore_cs(sma(funding_rate_avg_7d, 60))), zscore_cs(Decay_exp(ts_corr(log_returns, delay(log_returns, 6), 120), 0.02))), -3), 3)
alphas._note: Uses Binance-specific fields — will be SKIPPED if missing

alphas.expression: df_min(df_max(add(add(add(add(zscore_cs(sma(ts_corr(close_position_in_range, taker_buy_ratio, 60), 120)), zscore_cs(sma(taker_buy_ratio, 120))), zscore_cs(sma(ts_delta(s_log_1p(adv60), 30), 120))), zscore_cs(sma(funding_rate_avg_7d, 60))), zscore_cs(Decay_exp(ts_corr(log_returns, delay(log_returns, 6), 120), 0.02))), -3), 3)

_alpha_note: Includes all Binance alphas. Those using Binance-only fields (taker_buy_ratio, funding_rate, beta_to_btc) will be automatically skipped at runtime via missing-field detection. Only OHLCV-based alphas will run on KuCoin.
